parameters.formDescription: Upload a cover image, proof screenshot, TTS script, and background video to create an edited 16:9 MP4.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { user: { uid: 'n8n-video-clip' }, req_params: { text: $json.scriptText, speaker: $env.DOUBAO_TTS_VOICE || 'zh_female_shuangkuaisisi_moon_bigtts', audio_params: { format: 'mp3', sample_rate: 24000 } } } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, videoPath: $json.videoPath, jobDir: $json.jobDir, ffmpegLog: $json.ffmpegLog, size: $json.size } }}
